results.question: How does the report describe the accounting treatment of the NHS Superannuation Scheme for Scotland under IAS 19?
results.expected_answer: The Board is unable to identify its share of the underlying notional assets and liabilities of the scheme on a consistent and reasonable basis and therefore accounts for the scheme as if it were a defined contribution scheme, as required by IAS 19 Employee Benefits.
